name: A Rather Festive Maria Mushroom
description:
"Merry Christmas!"

A Merry Janitor Original too!

I know I'm late for crimbus day...

Also its been a while since I've done anything on this account, might as well change that for a moment.

A Fan-Take on the Mushroom Toppin' gal from the Toppin' Gals mod for Pizza Tower!

Definition is public so people can gather more information on most of the characters in my Fan-Take.

This is vaguely meant as a sequel to the original bot, with you coming back to Peppino Pizza on Christmas for... whatever reason..
A very Merry Mushroom wishes you a Happy Holidays!
creator: MechAI
